'''Goq Cranna''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sorrusian]] who served as chief of a Sorrusian tribe.

==Biography==
As [[Astri Oddo]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] came to [[Sorrus]] to obtain information on [[Ona Nobis]], Goq and his son, [[Bhu Cranna]], showed them where the hiding place of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]] was located. Later, he and his son helped Kenobi, Astri, [[Cholly]], [[Weez]] and [[Tup (thief)|Tup]] again, when they were trapped in a desert cavern by assisting them out of it. The cavern itself was, in fact, a trap set by Ona Nobis.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]''
